prompts.text: Name the shape and describe it: "That's a [shape] — it has [n] sides" or "it's round with no corners."
Before they tap, ask: "Which one is the same shape? What makes you think that?"
After a correct answer, ask: "Can you find a [shape] somewhere nearby?"
If they pick wrong, compare together: "Count the sides on this one... now count that one. Are they the same?"
